idea: A SaaS subscription management platform where businesses can create plans, manage customers, process payments via Stripe, and track MRR analytics
description: A SaaS subscription management platform for businesses

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: Overview of subscription plans and customer information

pages.name: Analytics
pages.description: View MRR analytics and track revenue

apis.description: Retrieve a list of subscription plans
Retrieve a list of customer subscriptions

taskGraph.request: Create plans table with columns (id, name, price) in backend/db/migrations/001_plans.sql
Create customers table with columns (id, name, email) in backend/db/migrations/002_customers.sql
Create subscriptions table with columns (id, customer_id, plan_id) in backend/db/migrations/003_subscriptions.sql
Create payments table with columns (id, subscription_id, amount) in backend/db/migrations/004_payments.sql
Implement POST /plans endpoint in backend/routes/plan-management.js — Create a new subscription plan
taskGraph.description: API: POST /plans — Create a new subscription plan

taskGraph.request: Implement GET /plans endpoint in backend/routes/plan-management.js — Retrieve a list of subscription plans
taskGraph.description: API: GET /plans — Retrieve a list of subscription plans

taskGraph.request: Implement POST /customers endpoint in backend/routes/customer-management.js — Create a new customer subscription
taskGraph.description: API: POST /customers — Create a new customer subscription

taskGraph.request: Implement GET /customers endpoint in backend/routes/customer-management.js — Retrieve a list of customer subscriptions
taskGraph.description: API: GET /customers — Retrieve a list of customer subscriptions

taskGraph.request: Implement GET /analytics/mrr endpoint in backend/routes/mrr-analytics.js — Retrieve MRR analytics
Implement POST /payments endpoint in backend/routes/payment-processing.js — Process a payment via Stripe
taskGraph.description: API: POST /payments — Process a payment via Stripe

taskGraph.request: Build Dashboard page at route /dashboard in frontend/pages/dashboard.jsx — Overview of subscription plans and customer information
Build Plan Creation page at route /plans/create in frontend/pages/plancreation.jsx — Create new subscription plans
Build Customer Management page at route /customers in frontend/pages/customermanagement.jsx — Manage customer subscriptions and information
Build Analytics page at route /analytics in frontend/pages/analytics.jsx — View MRR analytics and track revenue
